subcodes.first_line: The gaze of God's loving-kindness is directed towards thee - God Himself is witness and all mankind doth testify - that this Wronged One, for the Afnán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لحاظ عنایت حق بانجناب متوجه حق شاهد و خلق گواه که این مظلوم از برای افنان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
